# BRAND-VISUAL-v0.2 — Customer surface visual conformance (08-04b)

Visual brand pass for the v0.2 customer surface, captured by the Playwright E2E
run (desktop 1280 + mobile 375). Reviewed against the PSG design system at the
08-04b human-verify checkpoint. Pairs with the static-token audit in
`BRAND-CONFORMANCE-v0.2.md` (08-04) — that one greps the code; this one looks at
the rendered pixels.

## Screenshots (generated by `pnpm test:e2e`)

Artifacts under `e2e/screenshots/` (gitignored — local run artifacts):

| Page | Desktop | Mobile |
|------|---------|--------|
| Login | `login-desktop.png` | `login-mobile.png` |
| Dashboard (authenticated shell) | `dashboard-desktop.png` | `dashboard-mobile.png` |
| Settings (customer surface) | `settings-desktop.png` | `settings-mobile.png` |
| Shop switch — before (shop A) | `switch-before-desktop.png` | `switch-before-mobile.png` |
| Shop switch — after (shop B) | `switch-after-desktop.png` | `switch-after-mobile.png` |

## Design-system checklist (operator review)

- [ ] Eyebrow -> headline rhythm (uppercase tracked eyebrow above bold heading)
- [ ] Paper surface (`--background` warm paper, not stark white/teal)
- [ ] Single ember accent (one Phoenix Red highlight; no competing accent colors)
- [ ] Logo treatment (primary on light, reverse on the navy sidebar)
- [ ] Navy sidebar (Foundation Navy) with correct foreground contrast
- [ ] No BSM / boilerplate identity (no inherited teal, no template chrome)
- [ ] Mobile: hamburger nav + switcher render cleanly below `lg`

## Accessibility (axe WCAG 2.0/2.1 AA, in-run)

Final run: **0 serious/critical violations** across all five captured states
(login, dashboard, settings, switch-before, switch-after). 0 lower-impact
violations recorded.

| # | Finding | Rule | Severity | Disposition |
|---|---------|------|----------|-------------|
| A1 | `--muted-foreground: #949494` ("mist") on paper/white = 3.03:1, below the 4.5:1 AA floor. Hit every customer page (login muted copy, settings `dt` labels). | `color-contrast` | serious | **FIXED** — darkened the light-mode token to `#707070` (~4.95:1 on #fff, ~4.72:1 on #FAFAFA) in `globals.css`. Light-mode only; dark-mode `#8FA1B2` untouched. Re-run clean. Flagged as a deviation for UNIFY (touches Phase-2 token canon — small token value, revertable in one line if the operator objects). |

## Visual findings (operator review)

| # | Page | Finding | Severity | Disposition |
|---|------|---------|----------|-------------|
| — | all | No visual drift. Brand reads correct: paper surface, navy sidebar, single ember accent, logo treatment, eyebrow→headline rhythm; no BSM/boilerplate identity. Darkened muted text still reads as "mist." | — | PASS |

## Verdict

**PASS** — operator approved at the 08-04b human-verify checkpoint (2026-06-04).
Automated AA is GREEN; the `--muted-foreground` darken (#949494→#707070) is
accepted into the token canon. No visual fixes required.
